commands.review_summary:
The branch adds neutral CLI/TUI copy, timestamp prefixes for TUI rows, a hands-free exec-policy preset, docs/tests, and TUI session activity/project-scoping updates.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers by source inspection: the PR head shows Markdown-mutating timestamping, rest-key-only session-event matching, default-session bypass, and pending-user timestamp loss. No runtime reproduction was attempted, and the contributor has not supplied real behavior proof.
